title: JJK Cursed Fate Survival+ (Full)
description: ModPack based around the Aqua Jujutsu Kaisen Cursed Fate Mod, also adding more Biomes, Structues, whilst keeping decent performance. This uses Forge as a base to load the Mods.
body:
ModPack based around the Aqua Jujutsu Kaisen Cursed Fate Mod, also adding more Biomes, Structues, whilst keeping decent performance. This uses **Forge** as a base to load the Mods. This is a optimised ModPack for High Chunk count and FPS, designed around the **Jujutsu Kaisen/JJK**. This ModPack is mainly for **MC 1.20.1** as JJK Cursed Fate not being supported on newer versions of Minecraft.

**Notes:**

- Reccomended RAM allocated to MC: 8 to 12 GB (Change in Modrinth ModPack settings).

- Some Key Binds may not work due to conflicts, please change them for an Optimal Experience. (The provided Key Bind Config fixes some conflict issues in commonly used menus; use this as a base.)

- Shaders are disabled by default.

- Distant Horizons is set to the lowest allowed chunk value. Ajust to your preference for a smoother experience. Performance may vary depending on your CPU.

- **Some Shaders** may have **defects** or **issues** **displaying/rendering** Mobs and some moves from the Aqua Jujutsu Kaisen Cursed Fate Mod.

- Command to give **Cursed Technique**, etc: **/cursedfate**

![Infinite Void 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/crIr2aOe/images/87e8d84c5fa3715eeabff9f6a15895335f1c337a.png)

![Flame Arrow (Fuga)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/crIr2aOe/images/4ff733f841ac3ba59b79635cf646dfa9238796b9.png)

**Mods Used:**

- alexsmobs-1.22.9.jar
  
- Aquaculture-1.20.1-2.5.5.jar (Aquaculture 2 on Curse Forge)
  
- architectury-9.2.14-forge.jar
  
- BiomesOPlenty-forge-1.20.1-19.0.0.96.jar
  
- citadel-2.6.2-1.20.1.jar
  
- corpse-forge-1.20.1-1.0.23.jar (Corpse on Curse Forge)
  
- cursedfate-1.0.14.jar
  
- DistantHorizons-2.3.6-b-1.20.1-fabric-forge.jar
  
- embeddium-0.3.31+mc1.20.1.jar

- Essential_1-3-9-3_forge_1-20-1.jar

- fantasy_weapons-forge-0.4-1.20.1.jar

- ferritecore-6.0.1-forge.jar

- geckolib-forge-1.20.1-4.8.2.jar

- GlitchCore-forge-1.20.1-0.0.1.1.jar

- ImmediatelyFast-Forge-1.5.2+1.20.4.jar

- kleiders_custom_renderer-7.4.1-forge-1.20.1.jar

- moogs_structure_lib-1.0.1-1.20-1.20.4-forge.jar

- MoogsVoyagerStructures-1.20-5.0.21.jar

- notenoughanimations-forge-1.10.6-mc1.20.1.jar

- oculus-mc1.20.1-1.8.0.jar

- photon-forge-1.20.1-1.1.14.jar

- player-animation-lib-forge-1.0.2-rc1+1.20.jar (playerAnimator on Curse Forge)

- radium-mc1.20.1-0.12.4+git.26c9d8e.jar

- TerraBlender-forge-1.20.1-3.0.1.10.jar (TerraBlender (Forge) on Curse Forge)

- ToroHealth-Unofficial-Forge-1.20.1-1.0.0.jar (ToroHealth Unofficial on Curse Forge)

- Xaeros_Minimap_25.2.10_Forge_1.20.jar

- YungsApi-1.20-Forge-4.0.6.jar

- YungsCaveBiomes-1.20.1-Forge-2.0.5.jar

**Shaders Used/Included:**

- superDuperVanilla.zip
  
- Bliss_v2.1.1_(Chocapic13_Shaders_edit).zip

- ComplementaryReimagined_r5.6.1.zip

- ComplementaryUnbound_r5.6.1.zip

- photon_v1.2a.zip

- rethinking-voxels_r0.1-beta8.zip

**Links to Curse Forge Mods:**

- [Corpse (Forge 1.20.1-1.0.23)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse/files/7018272)

- [Aquaculture 2 (Forge 1.20.1-2.5.5)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aquaculture/files/6296111)

- [Player Animator (Forge 1.0.2-rc1+1.20)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/playeranimator/files/4587215)

- [TerraBlender (Forge 1.20.1-3.0.1.10)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terrablender/files/6290448)

- [ToroHealth Unofficial (Forge 1.20.1-1.0.0)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/torohealth-unofficial/files/4831219)

- [Super Duper Vanilla Shaders (Also on Modrinth)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/super-duper-vanilla-shaders)

Logo made with the help of **Canva** and **CityPNG**.

Licensing Note: This modpack is an independent project and is NOT officially associated with or endorsed by the original developers of JJK Cursed Fate, JJK, or any other included Mod or Anime. All mods included in this ModPack are open-source and used under their respective licenses (mostly MIT or GPL).
